creator: koobs@FreeBSD.org
text:
@Tobias Can you confirm this change passes QA please.

Also, you may want to prepare a patch to nghttp2 (not blocking this issue)

 If it were me, I'd have:

* www/libnghttp2 (libraries/headers only, including ASIO libs/headers)
* www/nghttp2 depending on www/libnghttp2
